title: form: empty test stmt accepted in test list
description: TRIGGER: read_test_stmt returns Ok([], pos) when the first token is ',' or ')'. read_test_list accepts this empty stmt and pushes it into the result. Input allof(,) or anyof() with a leading comma produces a TestList containing empty Stmt vectors. BAD BEHAVIOR: structurally invalid input passes the form layer and reaches the evaluator as Vec<Stmt> containing empty Stmts, which the evaluator must either handle or panic on. The form layer should reject empty test stmts with a ParseError. Fix: in read_test_list, after calling read_test_stmt, check that the returned Stmt is non-empty and return ParseError if it is.
